title: Partnership Program - Minimum User number
excerpt:
Goodmorning everyone. 
I have recently joined the Partnerhip program and am registering a Lead.

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Goodmorning everyone.
I have recently joined the Partnerhip program and am registering a Lead.

Clicking my trackable link and then going to Pricing comes to this point where the minimum Users are 5.

WhatsApp Image 2019-12-09 at 17.25.481152×2048 237 KB

If instead I do the same thing I find that the minimum Users are 2.

WhatsApp Image 2019-12-04 at 18.26.211600×774 111 KB

Is there any problem or limit?

My Lead only need 2 Users.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Interesting… when I open monday.com pricing and plans it starts with 5 users. Is there a difference from which region you are accessing this page?

posts.author: AleRun (Alessandro)
posts.cookedHtml:
Interesting… when I open monday.com/pricing it starts with 5 users. Is there a difference from which region you are accessing this page?

Surely IP different but always from Italy.

Officially, is the minimum number of Users 2 or 5?

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @AleRun

Thanks for reaching us here.

This is an A/B test we’re currently running so you can just ignore it.

I’m closing this thread

Cheers
Julia
